layout.description:
Guiding your career journey
with trusted visa and career insights

careerRoadmap.title: Integrated Career Roadmap
careerRoadmap.description: Generates a strategic plan aligning your visa milestones with career goals, based on your unique background.

taskBreakdown.title: Actionable Task Breakdown
taskBreakdown.description: Automatically converts major roadmap goals into detailed, step-by-step to-do lists.

jobCuration.title: Smart Job Curation
jobCuration.description: Personalized job recommendations based on your resume and cover letter analysis.
